text:
<@&1424461167883194418> Model updates — 2026-06-24

### 🆕 New
- 🧠 **GPT-5.4** (OpenAI) — vision, tool calling, and reasoning
- 🧠 **Mercury 2** (Inception) — tool calling
- 🧠 **Mistral Small 3.2** (Mistral) — vision and tool calling
- 🧠 **Gemini 3 Flash** (Google) — vision, audio/video input, tool calling, web search, and code execution
- 🧠 **Grok 4.20 Reasoning** (xAI) — vision, tool calling, and reasoning
- 🧠 **Claude Opus 4.6** (Anthropic) — vision and tool calling
- 🧠 **Moonshot Kimi K2.7 Code** (Moonshot AI) — vision, tool calling, and reasoning
- 🧠 **MiniMax M2.7** (MiniMax) — tool calling and reasoning
- 🔊 **ElevenLabs Multilingual v2** (ElevenLabs) — TTS
- 🔊 **ElevenLabs Sound Effects** (ElevenLabs) — TTS
- 🔊 **Stable Audio 3 Medium** (Stability AI) — TTS
- 🔊 **Stable Audio 3 Large** (Stability AI) — TTS

### 🗑️ Removed
- `gpt-5.5` (text)
- `mistral-4` (text)
- `gemini-3.5-flash` (text)
- `grok-4.3` (text)
- `claude-opus-4.8` (text)
- `kimi-k2.6` (text)
- `kimi-k2.7-code` (text)
- `minimax-m3` (text)

### ⬇️ Price cuts
- 🧠 Text: `grok-large` (~60% off) · `glm` (~30% off)
- 🔊 Audio: `elevenlabs` (~40% off) · `elevenflash` (~40% off) · `elevenmusic` (~50% off)

### ⬆️ Price increases
- 🧠 Text: `openai-large` (~100% more) · `mistral` (~200% more) · `gemini` (~200% more) · `kimi` (~35% more)

### ✨ Capability updates
- `minimax` — added image input

Explore at https://gen.pollinations.ai/docs
